summary: This release improves citation clarity, restores date-based search filtering, and ensures that follow-up question suggestions generate reliably.

entries.title: Scope notices for fallback searches
entries.description: When a product or date filter returns no results, the interface now displays a notice explaining that search results have expanded to include other products and timeframes rather than silently showing out-of-scope answers.

entries.title: Restored temporal date filtering for queries
entries.description: Queries seeking documents from specific timeframes (such as 'last 6 months') now correctly filter by publication date instead of failing back to the entire unfiltered document corpus.

entries.title: Substantive excerpts in citation panels
entries.description: Citation previews in the side panel now display actual document body text rather than redundant structural headers, making it easier to evaluate sources quickly.

entries.title: Deduplicated citations for multiple document versions
entries.description: The citation panel now collapses duplicate topics across different software versions to show only the most recent source, reducing visual clutter in the sidebar.

entries.title: Citation panel scrolling on small viewports
entries.description: Users can now scroll through long lists of citation sources (more than 6) on smaller screens without the list cutting off.

entries.title: Reliable follow-up suggestion chip generation
entries.description: Follow-up question chips will no longer occasionally disappear during rapid back-to-back queries, as the app now automatically retries when hitting API rate limits.

entries.title: Prolonged response generation latency
entries.description: Average response times range between 18 and 28 seconds due to backend model generation limits; streaming capabilities are planned for a future release.

entries.title: Unavailable version filtering for Cortex XSIAM
entries.description: Queries specifying a version for Cortex XSIAM will trigger a scope notice because XSIAM documentation is organized by date rather than version number.

entries.title: Limited Cortex AgentiX documentation coverage
entries.description: Because Cortex AgentiX is a newly launched platform, queries may return general XSOAR information while its documentation corpus continues to grow.
